name: DMS Document Search
description: Searches the personal document archive (invoices, contracts, letters, receipts, etc.) via dms_ai_bridge. Uses the ReAct agent for natural language answers, falls back to semantic search if unavailable.
author: dms_ai_bridge

input.hint: Base URL of the dms_ai_bridge server
X-Api-Key header value for dms_ai_bridge authentication
Your AnythingLLM user ID (must be mapped in config/user_mapping.yml on the bridge server)
Maximum number of results returned by the fallback semantic search endpoint

examples.prompt: Search my documents for invoices from last year
Find all contracts with Max Mustermann
Do I have any insurance documents?
Show me receipts from the supermarket

query.description: Natural language search query for the personal document archive
